note_ja: PM1で誤ってungroundedとされた既知の7種類の正しい主張が、v1.1Bの新しい入力契約(検証済み事実レジストリ全文を渡す)の下で実際にどう判定されたかを、実APIの生応答から個別に確認した記録。

known_claims.claim_text: Argentina came from behind to defeat England 2-1 in the World Cup semifinal on July 15, 2026.
known_claims.rationale: Matches the date, score, and teams in the registry.
known_claims.factual_grounding_status_reflection: pass(この主張がungroundedと判定されなかったため、attempt1のfactual_grounding_status=passに寄与)

known_claims.claim_text: Argentina came from behind to defeat England 2-1 in the World Cup semifinal on July 15, 2026.
known_claims.rationale: Matches the date, score, and teams in the registry.

known_claims.claim_text: Argentina came from behind to defeat England 2-1 in the World Cup semifinal on July 15, 2026.
known_claims.rationale: Matches the date, score, and teams in the registry.

known_claims.claim_text: Argentina came from behind to defeat England 2-1 in the World Cup semifinal on July 15, 2026.
known_claims.rationale: Matches the date, score, and teams in the registry.

known_claims.claim_text: Anthony Gordon scored England's opening goal.
known_claims.rationale: F02 explicitly states Anthony Gordon scored England's opening goal.

known_claims.claim_text: Fernandez equalized for Argentina, and Martinez scored the winning goal in the 92nd minute.
known_claims.rationale: F03 specifies the scorers and the timing of the winning goal.

known_claims.claim_text: Argentina then advanced to the World Cup final against Spain.
known_claims.rationale: F04 confirms Argentina advanced to the final against Spain.
known_claims.note_ja: 同じ主張がEndingでも再述され、そちらはsupporting_fact_ids=[F01,F04]としてgrounded判定された。

known_claims.claim_text: Argentina defeated England 2-1 in the World Cup semifinal on July 15, 2026.
known_claims.rationale: Matches the text in F01 exactly.

known_claims.rationale: Matches the text in F01 exactly.
台本試行2の本文にはAnthony Gordonへの言及が一切ない(F01の要約のみで、England得点者の個別記述がない)。claim_grounding_resultsにもGordon関連の項目は存在しない。
known_claims.factual_grounding_status_reflection: 該当なし(この台本にこの主張自体が存在しないため、ungrounded/groundedいずれの判定対象にもならない)

known_claims.claim_text: Fernandez equalized, and Martinez scored the winning goal in the 92nd minute.
known_claims.rationale: F03 provides these specific details including the 92nd-minute timing.

known_claims.claim_text: The result advanced Argentina to the final against Spain.

summary.note_ja: PM1で問題視された『Briefにfact_idがないことだけを理由にungroundedとされる』事象は、Q1では一件も再現しなかった(F01・F02・F04はいずれもBrief未引用だが、全てgroundedと正しく判定された)。
